purpose: This project is a NestJS starter template designed for building efficient and scalable server-side Node.js applications. It provides a minimal foundation for rapid backend development.
architectureSummary: The application follows a standard modular architecture where the entry point initializes the NestJS framework, which then orchestrates the controller and service layer to handle incoming GET requests.

techStack.name: NestJS
techStack.role: Serves as the primary framework for building the server-side application architecture.

techStack.name: TypeScript
techStack.role: Provides the language foundation for type-safe code development.

folderExplanations.explanation: Contains the core application logic, including the controllers, services, and the root module definition.
Holds the testing suite files used to verify application functionality.

entryPointNotes.note: This is the entry point used to bootstrap the NestJS application environment.
